name: Mixed Split Pea Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound green & yellow split pea mixture, dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the split peas in water to cover overnight; rinse and drain. Alternatively, boil hot water to cover the peas and let sit for 45 minutes. Drain, rinse, and drain again.
2. Sauté the onions, carrots, and fennel in a small amount of oil or butter until just translucent. Add the peas and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Add water to the stock pot and stir.
4. Bring to a rolling boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
5. Puree the soup in a food processor until smooth. Re-season to taste with salt and pepper.
Lu's Notes: This is very good and easy to make. It requires a good amount of pepper and salt. Tried on 01/30/99.
